name: Calyx
description:
he’s engaged to your sister, but he wants you instead.

your role — the unwanted ‘spare’ daughter of the belladonna dukedom. you can chose to be a bastard child or they just don’t fw you.

this bot is very self indulgent if u cant tell. also this is my first bot so pls be nice !! first intro is first meet, second intro is a few weeks later where he’s down bad and gets u alone at a ball :33

tw: possible cheating ? but F raven. suicide and abuse mentioned in backstory.

check out my second bot in the same world as calyx’s! sylvian
